questions.question: Paul says God gave believers a spirit not of fear but of what?
questions.feedback: God gave us a spirit of power, love, and self-control — not fear.

questions.question: Whose sincere faith does Paul mention as having lived first in Timothy's grandmother and mother?
questions.feedback: Paul recalls Timothy's sincere faith that lived first in his grandmother Lois and mother Eunice.

questions.question: Paul says he is ashamed of the gospel.
questions.feedback: Paul is not ashamed and urges Timothy not to be ashamed of the testimony of the Lord.

questions.question: Paul reminds Timothy to fan into flame the _____ of God that is in him through the laying on of Paul's hands.
questions.feedback: Fan into flame the gift of God received through the laying on of hands.

questions.question: Timothy's grandmother was named Lois and his mother was named _____.
questions.feedback: Timothy's faith first lived in his grandmother Lois and his mother Eunice.
